name: City of Ruins HG
author: fireyvortex2112
description: Hunger Games - City of Ruins (2013 custom legacy world)
extended_description:
Hunger Games map ported onto Xbox 360 when custom worlds were rare, ported with Horizon and downloaded from MCPEDL

Huge overgrown city with a spawn, nether minecart track to get to the map, redstone activated game start from the huge clock tower.

Issues because of conversion: 1. Nether portal spawns on nether roof

made by Slix Killer, hockeyal5, TheErxinator, ClevelandCavs1, and CentrinoUltra

(Original link to xbox savefile: https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/hunger-games-xbox-city-of-ruins/)
